node.title: Uber | Onsite | Design photo backup app

topic.title: Uber | Onsite | Design photo backup app

post.content:
Position: Android developer

We want to take a backup of all the photos that the user is taking through camera in our servers. How do you design an app for this?

Things to focus on:
* What server apis do you need
* When exactly would you report.
* What are the error cases
* Client app architecture
* What android components would you use.
for how many YOE is this?\n
Could you please share coding questions? :)
